name: Ren - Shy and Needy
description:
((CW: Vore!! Pred POV!!)

You and Ren have been dating for couple of months now, and it’s been going smoothly. Ren might seem antisocial on the outside, but once you’ve gotten to know him he’s a total sweetheart. Turns out he’s got trouble asking for things too, especially asking for some time in his favorite person.

Additional Info:

Ren adores being in your tummy, he thinks it’s his own little paradise. Ren is wearing a long sleeve like in the pic and some sweats. You can keep him for as long as he wants, just try not digest him. (Or do, be an ass)

A little something for my boy lovers. I don’t know what it is but Janitor just makes me go crazy for women and only women. Still like dudes though, that won’t change. Next on the agenda is an orc girl, then some kinky stuffing stuff… fun!

This is a suggestion! ⬇️
